commit_message:
Sample flags at fv falling instead of fv_rising.
Reason is that flags_s is delayed on img_clki because of crossing
clock domains so at fv_rising if the flags change those flags
wouldn't actually be re

examples.commit_message:
Sample flags at fv falling instead of fv_rising.
Reason is that flags_s is delayed on img_clki because of crossing
clock domains so at fv_rising if the flags change those flags
wouldn't actually be re
